title: cystopteris protrusa
intro: Cystopteris protrusa, also known as the small wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Cystopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce oxidative stress in the body. The health benefits of Cystopteris protrusa include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
